name: agentflow
description: Agent collaboration flow for task dispatch, evaluation, reporting, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate task dispatch, evaluation, reporting, and review.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills for sending tasks to another pane, evaluating inbound work, reporting results, and reviewing deliverables.
defaultPrompt: Use agentflow:task to turn this request into a structured task document.
Use agentflow:dispatch to send this task to another tmux pane.
Use agentflow:gate-review to review the reported result.
